issues.sample: My 2018 BMW M6 which cost me almost $90,000 suddenly lost its suspension balance and height.  Driving got bouncy, axles lost balance, driving turned hazardous. It was diagnosed that , The Virtual Dynamics Management module was fried and defected.  The replacement cost $2,571.40 w

narrative.headline: What 2018 Bmw M6 owners report most
